name: @stackra/routing
purpose: Client-side routing — guards, middleware, SEO, analytics, breadcrumbs, route modes, advanced matchers, and a defineRoute() builder over React Router v7.
capabilities: defineRoute() builder composed with React Router v7
SEO subpath: title, description, canonical, structured data
Advanced matchers: subdomain, query, header, hash
Route modes: page, dialog, drawer, sheet
Vite plugin for build-time route discovery
Console subpath for stackra host + route:list commands
when_to_use: Wiring routes, guards, and SEO for a React Router v7 SPA with per-package route contributions.
when_not_to_use: For the router primitive itself use react-router directly; for API routing use the backend routing package.
